description: Initial Kyoto cultural source batch for crawler development. This is seed data, not authoritative production data. Add measure_image_dimensions: true to any source that leaks logo, social, or navigation images into event media.

sources.name: Kyoto Art Center
sources.notes: Good mixed source for exhibitions, performances, talks, and workshops.

sources.name: Kyoto National Museum
sources.notes: Use the English exhibitions index and keep only the first two fully populated exhibition pages listed there.

sources.name: The Museum of Kyoto
sources.directions_query: The Museum of Kyoto, Sanjo Takakura, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto
sources.notes: Official special exhibition listing for The Museum of Kyoto. Follow only current/upcoming special exhibition cards.

sources.name: Hosomi Museum
sources.notes: Official current exhibition page for Hosomi Museum. The current exhibition page is also the detail page.

sources.name: KYOTOGRAPHIE
sources.notes: Use the English programs index as the canonical entry point for festival program pages.

sources.name: Art Collaboration Kyoto
sources.address_text: Kyoto International Conference Center, Takaragaike, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto 606-0001 Japan
sources.notes: Annual art fair. The homepage exposes the next edition dates and venue in the Visitor Information section; extract the homepage itself as the single yearly event.

sources.name: CURATION⇄FAIR Kyoto
sources.notes: Annual fair with at most one event. Watch the Kyoto NEWS index and create an event only when a current-year title contains `Announcement of CURATION⇄FAIR Kyoto`; use the detailed July 2026 release for current event fields.

sources.name: HOSOO GALLERY
sources.address_text: 2F HOSOO FLAGSHIP STORE, 412 Kakimoto-cho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-8173 Japan
sources.notes: Use the English exhibitions archive and only extract links from the exhibition article cards, so research pages and section indexes do not leak into the crawl.

sources.name: HUKO
sources.notes: Use the dedicated exhibition blog listing page, which links into individual exhibition entries under /blogs/exhibition/.

sources.name: hakari contemporary
sources.address_text: Porte de Okazaki #103, 140 Okazakienshoji-cho, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto-shi, Kyoto 606-8344 Japan
sources.directions_query: hakari contemporary, Porte de Okazaki #103, 140 Okazakienshoji-cho, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto
sources.notes: Use the exhibitions page cards. Current and upcoming sections may be empty; when that happens, the crawler should find detail pages and skip past events. Extract exhibition prose separately from event information and omit the first two poster images from event media.

qa.language_url_pattern: Japanese source only; English locale has no listing URL and should be machine-translated.

field_sources.listing_links: figure a cards on exhibitions page
field_sources.description: Exhibition prose beginning with the Hakari introduction; exclude event and related-event information.

qa.image_rules: Skip the first two unique images (wide and portrait poster variants); begin event media with installation or artwork images.

sources.name: Gallery Yamahon
sources.address_text: 2F Enjudo Minamikan, 95-3 Enoki-cho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-0931 Japan
sources.notes: Use the dedicated Kyoto exhibition page. The page starts with Japanese content and repeats the current exhibition in English lower down; prefer the English heading and description.

sources.name: Gallery Baiken
sources.directions_query: Gallery Baiken Kyoto, 682 Takenoko-cho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-8153 Japan
sources.notes: Site is Japanese only. Use the exhibition listing post cards and machine-translate title/description for English.

sources.name: KYOTOPHONIE
sources.notes: Festival source that may behave similarly to KYOTOGRAPHIE with program-style pages.

sources.name: Taka Ishii Gallery
sources.notes: Use the Kyoto (Yada-cho) location page directly and extract only the linked Kyoto exhibition archive detail pages.

sources.name: Sibasi
sources.notes: Use the live and exhibitions category pages, then only publish items whose actual event or exhibition dates are ongoing or upcoming.

sources.name: Kojin
sources.notes: Use the dedicated event listing. The homepage event rail links into `/event/<slug>/` detail pages.

sources.name: koen
sources.address_text: 15-2 Ichijoji Tsukamotocho, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto-shi, Kyoto 606-8176 Japan
sources.notes: Japanese-only BASE page. Events are listed directly inside the main tag container on the event information page.

sources.name: Kyoto Art Month
sources.notes: Current homepage behaves as an off-domain directory linking straight to partner venues rather than hosting stable on-domain program detail pages. Keep inactive until we add a source-specific aggregator.

sources.name: ZENBI
sources.notes: Exhibitions are listed on the dedicated exhibition index. Prefer current and upcoming exhibition cards and ignore linked news posts surfaced inside exhibition pages.

sources.name: Chushin Art Museum
sources.notes: Source-specific extractor splits exhibition sections on the single listing page; keep inactive until manually reviewed.

sources.name: MTK
sources.notes: Exhibitions are listed on the English exhibition index, while some linked detail pages resolve under /exhibition/<slug>/.

sources.name: ddd gallery
sources.address_text: 3F COCON KARASUMA, 620 Suiginya-cho, Shimogyo-ku, Kyoto 600-8411 Japan
sources.notes: Language toggle does not change the URL. Both locales use the same DDD schedule URL; crawler locale handling should select the Japanese or English content from page state/content, then keep only the first two exhibition blocks listed there, including the upcoming unlinked schedule entry.

sources.name: KYOCERA Museum
sources.notes: Strong institutional source with likely structured exhibition pages.

sources.name: MoMAK
sources.notes: Use only the English current/upcoming exhibition archive as the starting point. Avoid the Japanese archive and general information pages.

sources.name: Gallery Unfold
sources.notes: Language toggle does not change the URL. Both locales use the same archive URL; crawler locale handling should select Japanese or English content from page state/content. Only extract the first (most recent) item from the archive listing. Upcoming events lack images and content and should be skipped.

sources.name: Hakusa Son-so
sources.notes: Japanese-only exhibition crawl. The English site is a general-information landing page and does not expose usable exhibition detail content. Use the Japanese exhibition index and prefer linked detail pages under `/exhibition/detail/` over archive and index links.

sources.name: Sen-Oku Hakukokan
sources.notes: Kyoto museum homepage surfaces ongoing and upcoming exhibition program pages.

sources.name: Gallery Morning Kyoto
sources.notes: Homepage cards point to Blogspot post URLs like `/2026/04/...html`. Allow the Blogspot domain and prefer dated post URLs over archive pages.

sources.name: Nonaka-Hill
sources.notes: Only extract current and upcoming exhibitions; skip the archive section further down the page.

sources.name: KCUA
sources.notes: The EN/JA language selector is in the site menu; open the menu to switch localized versions.

sources.name: Leica Gallery Kyoto
sources.notes: The filtered Leica events page includes galleries across Japan. Follow only Leica Gallery Kyoto event links.

sources.name: The Terminal Kyoto
sources.notes: Japanese-only site. Use the exhibition-type filtered event listing.

sources.name: Artro
sources.notes: English-only site. Use the dedicated exhibition listing page.

sources.name: Imura Art

names.ja: イムラアートギャラリー

sources.directions_query: Imura Art Gallery Kyoto, 31 Kawabata-higashi Marutamachi, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto 606-8395 Japan
sources.notes: Default exhibition language is English. Current exhibitions render inside the .content container after /exhibition/data.json loads; future exhibitions are exposed through the Future tab/page. Detail pages use an EN/JP language tab on the same URL.

sources.name: Purple Purple
sources.address_text: Shikiamicho Bldg 3F, 122-1 Shikiamicho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-8261 Japan
sources.directions_query: PURPLE, Shikiamicho Bldg 3F, 122-1 Shikiamicho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-8261 Japan
sources.notes: Default language is Japanese. English top link is https://purple-purple.com/en/; the English navigation exposes the exhibition archive at /en/exhibition/, which only includes entries available as translated English posts.

sources.name: KyotoBa
sources.directions_query: 京都場 KYOTO-ba, 6-5 Nishinokyo Nanseicho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-8412 Japan
sources.notes: Default language is Japanese. Gallery events are listed on /gallery/ in the Modern Events Calendar schedule; follow the event title links under /events/.

sources.name: Sokyo Kyoto
sources.directions_query: Sokyo Gallery, 381-2 Motomachi, Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto 605-0089 Japan
sources.notes: Use Current and Upcoming exhibition cards only. Japanese URLs remove the /en/ prefix; Past cards are excluded from discovery.

sources.name: Raku Museum
sources.notes: English exhibition index uses the current and forthcoming tabs inside #contents .tabContent. Japanese homepage uses the .info topic list; each exhibition row links its title to the event page. The header offers an English/Japanese language toggle.

sources.name: Kusakabe Gallery
sources.notes: The homepage contains one current exhibition in this order: event information, Wix slideshow feature image, then description. Parse the date and hours from the first block and use the original Wix media URI instead of its blurred LQIP src.

field_sources.date: Event information block before the homepage slideshow.
field_sources.description: Paragraphs immediately after the homepage slideshow.

qa.image_rules: Use the original imageData URI from the first slideshow wow-image; never store the blur_2 LQIP src.

sources.name: Kuramonzen
sources.notes: The header offers an English/Japanese language toggle. The listing mixes current, upcoming, and past exhibitions, so crawl article links and parse dates on each detail page. Detail pages include a related section titled "Others exhibitions" after the article content.

sources.name: Oscaar Mouligne
sources.notes: Gallery exhibition listing. Site only in English.

sources.name: Kankakari
sources.notes: Use the Wix news listing as the index and follow exhibition posts under `/single-post/`. Site only in Japanese language.

sources.name: SAMAC
sources.notes: Crawl both the current (index.php) and upcoming (index.php?m=future) exhibition index pages. Keep only the first extracted event image.

qa.image_rules: Keep only the first extracted image for each event.

sources.name: Fukuda Art Museum
sources.notes: Japanese default source. Current exhibitions are listed on /exhibition and upcoming exhibitions on /exhibition-cat/after. English uses /en/exhibition and /en/exhibition-cat/after. Listing cards live inside section#exArv.

sources.name: Oyamazaki Villa Museum
sources.notes: English exhibition listing for the Oyamazaki Villa Museum, just outside Kyoto.

sources.name: MIHO Museum
sources.address_text: 300 Momodani, Tashiro, Shigaraki-cho, Koka, Shiga 529-1814 Japan
sources.notes: Use the current exhibition landing pages, which link into exhibition detail pages under `/en/exhibition/<slug>/`.

sources.name: Art Gallery Kitano

names.ja: アートギャラリー北野

sources.address_text: Koka Building, 439-4 Ebisu-cho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-8005 Japan
sources.directions_query: アートギャラリー北野, 京都市中京区恵比須町439-4
sources.notes: Japanese-only Current and Upcoming listing. Each exhibition is an inline block with one image and no detail page.

sources.name: galerie16
sources.address_text: Togawa Building 3F, 394 Sekisenin-cho, Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto 605-0021 Japan
sources.directions_query: galerie16, 京都市東山区石泉院町394
sources.notes: Use Current and Future listings only; Past is excluded.

sources.name: Gallery Take Two

names.ja: ギャラリーテイクツー

sources.address_text: Casa Gokomachi 1F, 399 Kameya-cho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-0941 Japan
sources.directions_query: Gallery Take Two, 京都市中京区亀屋町399
sources.notes: Japanese-only inline schedule. Keep one image per exhibition and drop placeholder cards whose image file is named coming soon.

sources.name: ARTS&SCIENCE Kyoto
sources.address_text: 京都府中京区樋ノ口町459番地
sources.notes: Use the official event feed, then keep only current/upcoming records whose event-detail data contains KYOTO. Parse dates only from the Kyoto event-detail row because one page can contain separate Tokyo and Kyoto schedules.

venue_locations.name: A&S Kyoto
venue_locations.address_text: 京都府京都市中京区東生洲町482番地3角

venue_locations.name: &SHOP Kyoto
venue_locations.address_text: 京都府京都市中京区東生洲町482-3

venue_locations.name: HIN / Arts & Science, Nijodori Kyoto
venue_locations.address_text: 京都府中京区樋ノ口町459番地

venue_locations.name: A&S Aneyakoji Kyoto
venue_locations.address_text: 京都府京都市中京区丸屋町334-1

venue_locations.name: CORNER
venue_locations.address_text: 京都府京都市中京区樋之口町465-2

qa.language_url_pattern: English event pages add /en/ before events; Japanese pages omit it.

field_sources.listing_links: Official WordPress event feed, filtered by current/upcoming Kyoto period and KYOTO in event-detail data.
field_sources.title: Detail-page .hero__title.

qa.image_rules: Use the detail-page hero image only.

sources.name: ISSEY MIYAKE KYOTO | KURA
sources.address_text: 89 Tsuchiya-cho, Yanaginobaba-dori Sanjo-sagaru, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto 604-8112 Japan
sources.directions_query: ISSEY MIYAKE KYOTO KURA, Tsuchiya-cho, Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto
sources.notes: Follow only exhibition cards tagged ON VIEW (開催中) under the Exhibitions and Events List.
